name: MCP Gateway
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure API Management
services.purpose: MCP gateway — tool routing, rate limiting, API key management, request transformation

dev.note: 1M free calls/month, pay per additional call

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: MCP server runtime — tool registration, protocol handling, server-sent events

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.purpose: Centralized observability — tool call tracing, latency dashboards, usage analytics

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.purpose: Tool response caching — frequently called tools, session state, rate limit counters

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Backend API keys, MCP server secrets, mTLS certificates, APIM subscription keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Distributed tracing — tool call chains, error rates, dependency maps

services.name: Log Analytics
services.purpose: Centralized logging — APIM diagnostics, gateway errors, tool registration events

optimization_tips: Use APIM Consumption tier for dev — $0 base cost, only pay per API call, saves $170/month vs Standard
Cache idempotent tool responses in Redis with 5-minute TTL — reduces backend calls by 40-60%
Use APIM rate limiting to prevent runaway tool calls — protects backend costs from LLM retry loops
Consolidate monitoring — use a single Log Analytics workspace for APIM, Container Apps, and Redis diagnostics
Use Container Apps scale-to-zero for rarely called MCP servers — no cost when idle
Implement APIM response caching policies for deterministic tools — avoids hitting backend entirely
